blockers_before_public_or_full_scale_act.description: Full source verification for India admin, India city/capital and global city/capital banks is pending.
Candidate coordinates/timezones are not computation-approved except future pilot records after AG71A.
Public dropdown remains blocked until pilot activation and validation stages.
Panchang and Star Reflection runtime computation remain blocked until pilot runtime validation.
Bulk location-bank scale is allowed only after the 4-location pilot passes.
Lat/long coordinate-first UI path for Panchang and Star Reflection must pass pilot validation before public activation.
